title: Can you view which admin added a user to teams or made them an admin?
excerpt: Can an admin view the history for a particular user to see which other admin added that user to specific teams or made them an admin, or when those activities occurred?

posts.author: stephITPM (Stephanie)
posts.cookedHtml: Can an admin view the history for a particular user to see which other admin added that user to specific teams or made them an admin, or when those activities occurred?
